data.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Stock Up 1.3% After Key Signal
data.description: A significant trading signal occurred for shares of Thermo Fisher Scientific at $444.92, after which TMO rose up to 1.3%.

data.title: Bessent Says Tariffs On China Are 'Far From A Joke,' Dismisses Treasury Dumping Fears
data.description: Treasury Sec. Bessent confident in trade talks & US markets despite volatility. Fast-moving agenda to reshape trade & keep hard line on China.

data.title: Stablecoins To Surge To $2 Trillion By 2028, Says Standard Chartered: Here's What It Means For The Dollar
data.description: A forthcoming U.S. regulatory framework is expected to supercharge the stablecoin market, pushing its total value from $230 billion today to $2 trillion by the end of 2028.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson Q1 Earnings: Strong Cancer Drug Sales, Boosts Quarterly Dividend, Anticipates Negative Currency Impact For 2025 Profit
data.description: Johnson & Johnson raised its 2025 sales outlook and dividend, while Q1 results topped expectations driven by strong cancer drug performance.
